subcodes.first_line: In these days it hath acquired paramount importance and become an absolute obligation that in every village wherein two souls [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در این ایّام اهمیّت حاصل نموده است و فرض عین گشته که در هر دهکده که دو نفر
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @eulogies; reminiscences, @translation; publication of the Sacred Writings, @spiritual assemblies; administrative matters
